indication: First-line treatment of metastatic non-small cell lung carcinoma (NSCLC) in adults whose tumours express PD-L1 with a >= 50% tumour proportion score (TPS) with no EGFR mutations or ALK translocations.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved pembrolizumab (200mg and 400mg) for reimbursement as a treatment option for the first-line treatment of adult patients with metastatic non-small cell lung carcinoma (NSCLC) whose tumors express PD-L1 with a >= 50% tumor proportion score (TPS) with no EGFR mutations or ALK translocations.

document.name: Pembrolizumab 400mg Monotherapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Pembrolizumab 400mg Monotherapy, 2024, version number 12a, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6389/558_v12b_Pembrolizumab_400mg_monotherapy.pdf
